name: Hot Roll Mix
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Instant Non Fat Dry Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Stir together to distribute evenly.
3. Transfer the mixture to a large, airtight container.
4. Label as HOT ROLL MIX and store in a cool, dry place.
5. Use within 6 to 8 months.
